parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ due_only: $json.due_only, limit: $json.limit, dry_run: $json.dry_run, channel: $json.channel, automation_id: $json.automation_id, ...(Array.isArray($json.job_ids) && $json.job_ids.length ? { job_ids: $json.job_ids } : {}) }) }}

={{ ({ workflow: { followUp: { reminder: { created: true, status: $json.writeback_status, channel: $json.channel, lastRunAt: $json.last_run_at, deliveredAt: $json.writeback_status === 'sent' ? $json.delivered_at : null, automationId: $json.automation_id, notes: $json.notes } } } }) }}
